subcodes.first_line: Thy name hath been mentioned before the Wronged One, thy call hath been heard, and in response this blessed Tablet hath been vouchsafed. We beseech God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اسمت نزد مظلوم مذکور ندایت مسموع و باین لوح مبارک جواب عنایت شد از حق میطلبیم
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @goodly deeds; actions
